name: mixed_emotions
description: Same late-school-run pressure, but with two positive moments injected: at t=14s (right after the cut-off) another driver lets the ego in with a friendly wave, and at t=42s a polite, patient overtake. Designed to make the closed loop visibly REVERSE direction at the courtesy events — V should swing up, frustration should drop. Tests whether the persona spread holds across both polarities of affect.
